vulnerability.reference: Developer overconfidence in LLM-generated rollouts reduces validation, leading to deployment of brittle policies.
vulnerability.generated: Developer overconfidence in LLM-synthesized interactions masks distribution-shift failure modes, preventing effective risk assessment.

impact.reference: Widespread deployment of unsafe agents causing user harm.
impact.generated: Live agents perform unsafe web actions, causing financial loss, data breaches, and reputational damage to developers and users.

dose_response.reference: Autonomous skill acquisition via LLM rollouts generates unreliable policies; developer overconfidence in synthetic data skips validation, deploying brittle agents that cause widespread user harm and trust erosion.
dose_response.generated: Autonomous skill acquisition without human oversight, through developers deploying agents trained on LLM interactions, triggers overconfidence that masks distribution-shift failures, leading to unsafe web actions with financial loss, data breaches, and reputation damage.
